rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-primary
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-primary

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: bento-inspired asymmetrical layouts where possible, generous gaps (gap-8 to gap-12)

motion_and_interactions.parallax: Heavy use of framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for background and floating 3D elements
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for lists, scale-in for images
motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle translate-y-1, increased shadow on cards; scale 1.05 on images
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Primary button in secondary color (#E87722) with hover brightness increase; Outline button in primary color (#1B4B5A)

components_strategy.header: Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-primary/10), sticky top z-50
components_strategy.hero: Full height min-h-[90vh], complex z-index layering for 3D floating elements (stethoscope, pill, cross), clear H1 and double CTA.
components_strategy.services_cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px border, subtle shadow-sm, hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300. Icons in secondary color.
components_strategy.contact_form: Shadcn based input/textarea/button, clear validation, send email action (mocked or api).
components_strategy.whatsapp_float: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50, vibrant green or theme secondary color, pulse animation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
Implement Framer Motion extensively for scroll animations: Use 'useScroll' and 'useTransform' mapped to mouse position and scroll depth for the 3D elements in the Hero section.
Structure the project into distinct sections components (Hero, About, Services, Doctors, Testimonials, Facilities, Contact) and assemble them in the main page.

Ensure the hero section uses the clinic interior as a very subtle, low opacity background, with the 3D floating elements (pill, stethoscope, cross) moving dynamically at different z-indexes on scroll/mouse move.
Integrate the exact provided logo colors (#1B4B5A and #E87722) accurately across buttons, accents, and icons.
Include a fixed floating WhatsApp CTA button at the bottom right that redirects to: https://wa.me/917904203074
Design the doctors section as a split-screen or large profile cards featuring Dr. Karthik and Dr. Shivani.
Ensure all components are mobile responsive.
Add data-testid to all interactive components like buttons, links, and forms.
